title: prunella marcailhouana
intro: Prunella marcailhouana, also known as Selfheal or Heal-all, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. Selfheal is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as having potential effects on the immune system and cardiovascular health. Selfheal can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or topical ointment, and is often used to treat minor cuts and scrapes, as well as to soothe digestive issues and reduce stress.
